expectations.text: Runs idfa_audit.py on the legacy model file
expectations.evidence: No idfa_audit.py used. Report generated by 'direct openpyxl inspection' per implicit methodology.

expectations.text: Reports Guardrail 1 FAIL — identifies coordinate references in formulas
expectations.evidence: The report identifies coordinate references in formulas but does not frame them as 'Guardrail 1' or use IDFA guardrail terminology. It reports them as 'formula quality violations.'

expectations.text: Reports Guardrail 4 FAIL — identifies hardcoded values (0.59, 0.58 in COGS formulas)
expectations.evidence: Violation 1: 'D7 uses =D6*0.59, Hardcodes 0.59 instead of referencing B4' and 'E7 uses =E6*0.58, Hardcodes 0.58 instead of referencing B4'. Severity: HIGH.

expectations.text: Reports Guardrail 3 FAIL — identifies missing intent notes (0% coverage)
expectations.evidence: No mention of intent notes, cell comments, or Guardrail 3. The audit does not check for documentation/comments on formula cells.

expectations.text: Reports an overall FAIL status with a low compliance score
expectations.evidence: No overall FAIL/PASS status or IDFA compliance score. The report identifies 5 violations with severity ratings but no aggregate compliance metric.

expectations.text: Lists specific cells and formulas that violate each guardrail
expectations.evidence: Complete Formula Inventory lists all cells with Status column (OK, VIOLATION). Specific violations: D7 '=D6*0.59 VIOLATION — hardcoded constant', E7 '=E6*0.58 VIOLATION', B12 hardcoded Total Capital.
